summary: Edwardian British novelist. Known for Howards End, A Room with a View, A Passage to India, Where Angels Fear to Tread, Maurice. Also wrote short stories and the essay 'What I Believe.'

works.name: Howards End
works.description: Novel about the Wilcoxes and the Schlegels. Leonard Bast crushed by a bookcase.

clues.clue: Wilcoxes and Schlegels; Margaret and Helen Schlegel; Henry Wilcox 'refused to connect'
examples: created the Wilcoxes and the Schlegels

clues.clue: Leonard Bast crushed by falling bookcase (beaten with a sword)
examples: a man dies after he is beaten with a sword, causing a bookcase to fall onto him

clues.clue: Helen, Margaret, Tibby interpret Beethoven's Fifth differently
examples: Helen sees this work as a story involving heroes, goblins and shipwrecks

works.name: A Room with a View
works.description: Lucy Honeychurch meets George Emerson in Italy.

clues.clue: Lucy Honeychurch and George witness a murder in Italy; exchange rooms to view the Arno
examples: Lucy Honeychurch and George witness a murder before eventually getting married
Lucy meets George in Italy and exchanges accommodations

works.name: A Passage to India
works.description: Dr. Aziz accused of assaulting Adela Quested in the Marabar Caves.

clues.clue: Dr. Aziz accused of assaulting Adela Quested in Marabar Caves; Cyril Fielding's tea party
examples: Dr. Aziz, who is accused of assaulting the British woman Adela Quested in the Marabar Caves

works.name: Other Works
works.description: Where Angels Fear to Tread, Maurice, short stories, essays.

clues.clue: Where Angels Fear to Tread — Lilia Herriton marries Italian; baby dies in carriage accident
examples: Lilia Herriton's marriage to an Italian dentist's son

clues.clue: Maurice — homosexuality; Clive Durham; Alec Scudder the gamekeeper
examples: begins a relationship with Clive Durham, but he ends up choosing Alec Scuddel the gamekeeper

clues.clue: 'What I Believe' — sooner betray one's country than one's friend
examples: one should sooner rather betray one's country than one's friend

clues.clue: 'The Machine Stops' — sci-fi about civilization ending; Kuno tells mother the title phrase
examples: Kuno telling his mother the title phrase before civilization ends

clues.clue: Zadie Smith's On Beauty mirrors Howards End's opening
examples: The opening emails in On Beauty mirror Helen's letters

comprehensive_summary: E.M. Forster is an Edwardian British novelist. Howards End centers on the Wilcoxes and Schlegels; Leonard Bast is crushed by a bookcase. A Room with a View follows Lucy Honeychurch and George in Italy. A Passage to India features Dr. Aziz accused in the Marabar Caves. Maurice deals with homosexuality. His essay 'What I Believe' says one should sooner betray one's country than one's friend. 'The Machine Stops' is a prescient sci-fi story.
